mapper.select: SELECT EDUC_NO, PERSON_ID, SUBJECT, DEGREE_CODE, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(DEGREE_CODE, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS DEGREE_NAME, DEGREE_TYPE, INSTITUTION_NAME, RANK, EDUC_CARD_NO, SCHOOL_ADDRESS, COMPETENT_DEPARTMENT, SUBJECT_SECOND, PARTICULAR_DEGREE, REMARKS, SUBJECT_CLASSIFY, SUBJECT_CLASSIFY_TWO, SITE_PROVINCE, SITE_CITY, FINAL_DEGREE_WHETHER, SCHOOL_TYPE, DEGREES_CODE, GRADUATION_TYPE, EDU_DEG_NUM, OTHER_SCHOOL_NAME, GPA, ORDERNO, ACTIVITY, UPDATE_EDUC_NO, APPLY_TYPE, FILE_URL, FILE_NAME, ESS_TYPE_CODE, REMARK, PLACE, STUDY_EXPERIENCE, SITE_COUNTRY, START_DATE, END_DATE, EARROR, CALLBACK FROM HR_EDUCATION_APPLY WHERE EDUC_NO = #{applyNo, jdbcType=NUMERIC}
